title: Generalization Issues Path
description: Build fluency in Generalization Issues inside Model Evaluation by moving from foundational terms into adjacent methods, variants, and extensions.

steps.title: Inductive Bias in Machine Learning
steps.summary: Inductive Bias in Machine Learning belongs to the Model Evaluation area of AI/ML, within Generalization Issues. It sits inside Model Evaluation / Generalization Issues. Start after Inductive Bias and Inductive Bias in Learning Algorithms. It opens into Inductive Bias in Machine Learning Extensions and Inductive Bias in Machine Learning Extensions Techniques.
steps.whyIncluded: Start here to anchor the vocabulary and core intuition for this area.

steps.title: AI Bias
